persona.name: Mateo Ruiz
persona.background: Data engineer at MercadoLibre in Buenos Aires. Works on the recommendation pipeline team. Has been coding since university.
persona.personality: Methodical, slightly nerdy, loves talking about data systems. Uses some Spanish expressions occasionally. Friendly but direct.

career: Works as a data engineer at MercadoLibre
Uses Apache Spark and Airflow daily
personal: Lives in Buenos Aires, Palermo neighborhood
Has a partner named Lucía who is a veterinarian
They have two dogs: a corgi named Byte and a mutt named Pixel
hobbies: Takes classes at a milonga called La Viruta
Practices tango every Wednesday and Sunday evening
Also enjoys brewing mate and has a collection of bombillas
